message.content:
@startuml
title Skava Integration – Order Replaced Completed

package "Skava AWS" {
  participant "Skava Event Orchestration" as SkavaEventOrchestration
}

package "Kafka" {
  participant "Topics" as KafkaTopics
}

package "YL Services" {
  participant "Order Sync Service" as OrderSyncService
}

participant "Legacy DB" as LegacyDB

SkavaEventOrchestration -> KafkaTopics: 1 Produce OrderReplacedCompleted Message
activate KafkaTopics
KafkaTopics --> OrderSyncService: 2 Consume OrderReplacedCompleted Message
activate OrderSyncService
OrderSyncService -> LegacyDB: 3 Update order status in legacy db
activate LegacyDB
LegacyDB --> OrderSyncService: 4 Response/Order ID
deactivate LegacyDB
OrderSyncService -> KafkaTopics: 5 Produce OrderReplacedCompletedProcessed Message
deactivate OrderSyncService
KafkaTopics --> SkavaEventOrchestration: 6 Consume OrderReplacedCompletedProcessed Message
deactivate KafkaTopics

note right of KafkaTopics: Async
note right of KafkaTopics: Async
@enduml
